## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `npm run test:component`

## Checklist

- [ ] Changelog updated under `Unreleased` (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Docs updated (README/env/docs) if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] No secrets or local env files included
